assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.version === '1' && data.metadata && Number.isInteger(data.metadata.decision_count) && data.metadata.decision_count > 0 && Array.isArray(data.decisions) && data.decisions.length === data.metadata.decision_count && data.decisions.every((d) => typeof d.id === 'string' && typeof d.decision === 'string')
